stem: A property consists of a 9-hectare vineyard and a 16-hectare forest. The total number of trees on the property is 4,275. The equation 9x + 16y = 4,275 represents this situation. Which of the following is the best interpretation of x in this context?

answerOptions.content: The total number of trees in the vineyard
The total number of trees in the forest
The average number of trees per hectare in the forest
The average number of trees per hectare in the vineyard

rationale: The coefficient of x is 9 (the hectares of vineyard), so 9x is the total trees in the vineyard. Therefore x is the average number of trees per hectare in the vineyard. Choice D is correct.
